info.title: Pendragon Campaign Database
info.description: Persistent multi-generational campaign memory for Pendragon 6th Edition.

post.summary: Synchronize a Foundry VTT character snapshot
post.description: Append only trait, skill, passion, and Glory changes from Foundry VTT. Submitting an unchanged snapshot creates no new historical rows.

ApiKeyAuth.name: X-API-Key
ApiKeyAuth.description: Campaign API key stored as a secret in the calling client.

x-chatgpt-instructions.purpose: Persistent memory for multi-generational Pendragon campaigns.
rules: Never invent UUIDs. List or create the required parent record first.
Treat events, ledgers, ancestry, inheritance transfers, and family history as append-only.
Use the campaign_id from the selected campaign on every campaign-scoped call.
Record significant narrative changes as events and link domain records when supported.
Respect knowledge scope: gm_only data must not be disclosed to players.
